table-348-348.pgTitle: Cards Illustrated by Stephen Daniel with Ruling Text and Property Status
table-348-348.caption: Find all cards illustrated by Stephen Daniel and describe the text of the ruling of these cards. State if these cards have missing or degraded properties and values.
data: "When Angel of Glory's Rise enters the battlefield, exile all other Humans from your graveyard and all Humans from the battlefield. "
"Create three 1/1 white Human creature tokens. Flashback {5}{W}"
"{1}{W}: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control."
"Spells and abilities your opponents control can't cause you to sacrifice permanents or cause you to discard cards."
